instruction: Configure VS Code to edit GIMP script-fu scripts effectively by installing lisp extension. Test by writing code to resize the image "character.png" to 128 * 128 as "resized.png".

evaluator.eval: is_extension_installed(get_vm_command_line(env, config={'command': ['code', '--list-extensions', '|', 'grep', 'mattn.lisp']}), get_rule(env, config={'rules': {'type': 'contain', 'expected': 'mattn.lisp'}})) and check_image_size(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/Desktop/resized.png', 'dest': 'resized.png'}), get_rule(env, config={'rules': {'height': 128, 'width': 128}}))
